subcodes.first_line: There is many a divine wisdom in fasting. Among them is this: that, in the days… O Divine Providence! As I am abstaining from bodily desires
subcodes.first_line_orig: حکمت الهیه در صیام بسیار است از جمله چون در آن ایام مطلع شمس حقیقت
subcodes.subjects: @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @law of fasting, @spiritual transformation
